mapper.select: SELECT SUPPLIER_ID AS "supplierId", SUPPLIER_NAME AS "supplierName", MANAGER_NAME AS "managerName", PHONE AS "phone" FROM SUPPLIER WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY SUPPLIER_NAME

SELECT PRODUCT_ID AS "productId", PRODUCT_CODE AS "productCode", PRODUCT_NAME AS "productName", STORAGE_TYPE AS "storageType", UNIT AS "unit", STANDARD_PURCHASE_PRICE AS "standardPurchasePrice", STANDARD_SALES_PRICE AS "standardSalesPrice", IS_PRESCRIPTION AS "isPrescription", STATUS AS "status" FROM PRODUCT ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT PRODUCT_ID AS "productId", PRODUCT_CODE AS "productCode", PRODUCT_NAME AS "productName", UNIT AS "unit", STANDARD_PURCHASE_PRICE AS "standardPurchasePrice" FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PRODUCT_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY
SELECT STATUS AS "status", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM PURCHASE_ORDER GROUP BY STATUS

SELECT PO.PO_ID AS poId, PO.SUPPLIER_ID AS supplierId, S.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName, S.PHONE AS phone, RE.EMP_NAME AS requestEmpName, AE.EMP_NAME AS approveEmpName, PO.PO_DATE AS poDate, PO.STATUS AS status, PO.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, PO.MEMO AS memo FROM PURCHASE_ORDER PO JOIN SUPPLIER S ON PO.SUPPLIER_ID = S.SUPPLIER_ID JOIN EMPLOYEE RE ON PO.REQUEST_EMP_ID = RE.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AE ON PO.APPROVE_EMP_ID = AE.EMP_ID WHERE PO.PO_ID = #{poId}

SELECT POD.PO_DETAIL_ID AS poDetailId, POD.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, P.PRODUCT_CODE AS productCode, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.UNIT AS unit, POD.ORDER_QTY AS orderQty, POD.UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, POD.AMOUNT AS amount FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_DETAIL POD JOIN PRODUCT P ON POD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE POD.PO_ID = #{poId} ORDER BY POD.PO_DETAIL_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PURCHASE_ORDER ( PO_ID, SUPPLIER_ID, REQUEST_EMP_ID, PO_DATE, STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, MEMO, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PO.NEXTVAL, #{supplierId}, #{requestEmpId}, SYSDATE, 'REQUESTED', #{totalAmount}, #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO PURCHASE_ORDER_DETAIL ( PO_DETAIL_ID, PO_ID, PRODUCT_ID, ORDER_QTY, UNIT_PRICE, AMOUNT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PO_DETAIL.NEXTVAL, #{poId}, #{productId}, #{orderQty}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount} )
mapper.select: SELECT SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME FROM SUPPLIER WHERE SUPPLIER_ID = #{supplierId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PURCHASE_ORDER WHERE SUPPLIER_ID = #{supplierId} AND STATUS = 'REQUESTED'
SELECT PO_ID, REQUEST_EMP_ID, STATUS FROM PURCHASE_ORDER WHERE PO_ID = #{poId}
mapper.update: UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDER SET STATUS = 'APPROVED', APPROVE_EMP_ID = #{approveEmpId}, APPROVE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE PO_ID = #{poId} AND STATUS = 'REQUESTED'
UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDER SET STATUS = 'REJECTED', APPROVE_EMP_ID = #{approveEmpId}, MEMO = #{rejectReason}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE PO_ID = #{poId} AND STATUS = 'REQUESTED'
